# CWE-303 — Incorrect Implementation of Authentication Algorithm (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-303-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

// Vulnerable: compares MACs with ==, enabling timing leaks and wrong semantics.
func VerifyWebhook(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sig := r.Header.Get("X-Signature")
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(r.Body)
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte("secret"))
	mac.Write(body)
	expected := mac.Sum(nil)
	if string(expected) == sig {
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
		return
	}
	http.Error(w, "bad sig", http.StatusUnauthorized)
}
